title: Handmade Children's Books, Ceramics & Gifts • Columbus OH
announcement: Welcome to Tiny Roots Handmade! I create hand-illustrated board books, small-batch ceramic planters, and handwoven bags from my Columbus, OH studio. Great for babies, toddlers, and anyone who loves thoughtful handmade gifts. All books are printed on thick, durable board pages. Please allow 5-7 business days for made-to-order items. Custom name personalization available - just message me!
sale_message: Thank you so much for your order! I hope this brings a smile to someone special. I'll ship your item within 5-7 business days and send tracking info as soon as it's ready. Reach out anytime if you have questions!
policy_welcome: Thank you for visiting Tiny Roots Handmade!
policy_payment: I accept all major credit cards, PayPal, and Etsy gift cards through Etsy's secure checkout. For custom orders over $75, I request payment in full at time of ordering.
policy_shipping: All items ship from Columbus, OH via USPS First Class or Priority Mail. Ready-to-ship items go out within 3-5 business days. Made-to-order items ship within 7-10 business days. I ship internationally - please message me for rates.
policy_refunds: Your satisfaction matters to me! If an item arrives damaged, contact me within 48 hours with photos and I will send a replacement or full refund. Due to the handmade nature of items, I cannot accept returns for change of mind but please reach out and I will do my best to help.
